title: Sweetspot Capsule Manifest
description: A brick manifest for a constraint-first executable capsule. The capsule runner reads this contract before loading fixtures or source code.

x-sma-contract.change_policy: Optional additive fields preserve v1 compatibility; required, renamed, or narrowed fields require a new versioned $id and schema_version.
x-sma-contract.rollback: Consumers retain the v1 brick-manifest validator; rollback restores the previous schema and discards only newly-added optional fields.
x-sma-contract.lifecycle: Created from the capsule template, adapted by the owner, validated before every fixture run, and retained with the capsule source.
x-sma-contract.retention: Retain for the lifetime of the capsule and every published release that references it.
x-sma-contract.performance: Static file contract; database query and index budgets are not applicable. Validation is bounded by the manifest size.

brick.description: Capsule identity constrained to the capsule brick kind.
